name: Lemony Summer Squash
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the summer squash into 1/4-inch rounds.
2. Heat the walnut oil in a non-stick skillet over medium heat.
3. Add the garlic and cook for 1 minute, stirring occasionally.
4. Add the sliced squash to the skillet and stir gently until tender, about 4 minutes.
5. Stir in the dried rosemary and lemon juice, ensuring all ingredients are well combined.
6. Cook for an additional minute to allow flavors to meld.
7. Serve hot.
Food Exchange per serving: 1 VEGETABLES EXCHANGE; CAL: 31; CHO: 0mg; PRO: 1mg; SOD: 3mg; FAT: 2g.
